data.module_description:
Gateway Configuration是API网关的核心基础设施配置模块，负责整合网关层的各种横切关注点配置。该模块包含四个关键配置组件：

1. **CORS跨域配置(CorsConfiguration)**：创建CorsWebFilter过滤器，配置跨域策略允许所有来源、方法和请求头，支持携带Cookie凭证，确保前端应用能够跨域访问后端微服务API。

2. **响应式Redis配置(GatewayRedisConfig)**：为基于WebFlux的网关配置ReactiveRedisTemplate，使用StringRedisSerializer和GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer进行序列化，支持网关层的限流、会话管理和路由缓存等非阻塞Redis操作。

3. **HTTP客户端配置(HttpClientConfig)**：基于Apache HttpClient 5配置RestTemplate，实现连接池化管理（最大100连接，每路由20连接），配置空闲连接2分钟清理、读取超时5秒、连接请求超时30秒。

4. **上下文传播配置(EnableContextPropagation)**：启用Project Reactor的自动上下文传播，确保分布式追踪TraceId、Spring Security上下文和MDC日志上下文能够在响应式管道中正确传递。

该模块与Spring Cloud Gateway、Redis、Apache HttpClient深度集成，为网关的请求处理、缓存管理和下游服务调用提供统一的基础设施支持。
data.interaction:
**对外提供的接口：**

1. **CorsWebFilter Bean**
   - 类型：Spring Bean
   - 作用：注册到Spring WebFlux过滤器链，自动拦截所有请求处理CORS预检
   - 配置范围：所有URL路径("/**")

2. **ReactiveRedisTemplate<String, Object> Bean**
   - 类型：Spring Bean
   - 作用：提供响应式Redis操作模板，供网关其他组件（如限流、缓存）使用
   - 序列化策略：Key使用String，Value使用JSON

3. **RestTemplate Bean**
   - 类型：Spring Bean
   - 作用：提供HTTP客户端，用于网关与后端服务间的同步HTTP通信

4. **Reactor Context Propagation Hook**
   - 类型：全局配置
   - 作用：启用自动上下文传播，影响所有Reactor响应式流

**依赖的外部接口：**

1. **ReactiveRedisConnectionFactory**
   - 来源：Spring Boot自动配置
   - 用途：创建Redis连接

2. **Nacos配置中心**
   - 配置：192.168.35.128:8848
   - 用途：获取Redis、服务发现等配置参数

**交互方式：**
- 所有配置组件通过Spring IoC容器进行依赖注入
- 配置在应用启动时加载，通过@PostConstruct执行初始化逻辑
- 与Spring Cloud Gateway过滤器链集成，自动参与请求处理流程
data.flowchart_mermaid:
flowchart TD
    subgraph GatewayConfiguration["Gateway Configuration Module"]
        subgraph CORS["CORS Configuration"]
            CC[CorsConfiguration]
            CWF[CorsWebFilter Bean]
            CC --> |creates| CWF
        end
        
        subgraph Redis["Redis Configuration"]
            GRC[GatewayRedisConfig]
            RRT[ReactiveRedisTemplate Bean]
            SS[StringRedisSerializer]
            JS[Jackson2JsonSerializer]
            GRC --> |creates| RRT
            GRC --> |uses| SS
            GRC --> |uses| JS
        end
        
        subgraph HTTP["HTTP Client Configuration"]
            HCC[HttpClientConfig]
            RT[RestTemplate Bean]
            PCM[PoolingConnectionManager]
            HCC --> |creates| RT
            HCC --> |configures| PCM
            PCM --> |max:100| RT
        end
        
        subgraph Context["Context Propagation"]
            ECP[EnableContextPropagation]
            RH[Reactor Hooks]
            ECP --> |@PostConstruct| RH
            RH --> |enableAutomaticContextPropagation| CP[Context Propagation Enabled]
        end
    end
    
    subgraph ExternalDependencies["External Dependencies"]
        RCF[ReactiveRedisConnectionFactory]
        RedisServer[(Redis Server)]
        SpringBoot[Spring Boot AutoConfig]
    end
    
    subgraph Consumers["Configuration Consumers"]
        GWF[Gateway Filters]
        RateLimiter[Rate Limiter]
        SessionMgmt[Session Management]
        DownstreamCalls[Downstream Service Calls]
        Tracing[Distributed Tracing]
    end
    
    SpringBoot --> |provides| RCF
    RCF --> GRC
    RedisServer --> |connects| RCF
    
    CWF --> GWF
    RRT --> RateLimiter
    RRT --> SessionMgmt
    RT --> DownstreamCalls
    CP --> Tracing
    CP --> GWF
data.sequence_diagram_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
    participant App as Spring Application
    participant CC as CorsConfiguration
    participant GRC as GatewayRedisConfig
    participant HCC as HttpClientConfig
    participant ECP as EnableContextPropagation
    participant SpringCtx as Spring Context
    participant Redis as Redis Server
    participant Reactor as Reactor Core
    
    Note over App: Application Startup Phase
    
    App->>SpringCtx: Initialize Spring Context
    
    par Configuration Bean Creation
        SpringCtx->>CC: Create CorsConfiguration Bean
        CC->>CC: Create UrlBasedCorsConfigurationSource
        CC->>CC: Configure allowedHeaders("*")
        CC->>CC: Configure allowedMethods("*")
        CC->>CC: Configure allowedOrigins("*")
        CC->>CC: Configure allowCredentials(true)
        CC->>CC: Register "/**" path
        CC-->>SpringCtx: Return CorsWebFilter Bean
        
        SpringCtx->>GRC: Create GatewayRedisConfig Bean
        SpringCtx->>GRC: Inject ReactiveRedisConnectionFactory
        GRC->>GRC: Create StringRedisSerializer
        GRC->>GRC: Create GenericJackson2JsonRedisSerializer
        GRC->>GRC: Build RedisSerializationContext
        GRC-->>SpringCtx: Return ReactiveRedisTemplate Bean
        
        SpringCtx->>HCC: Create HttpClientConfig Bean
        HCC->>HCC: Create PoolingHttpClientConnectionManager
        HCC->>HCC: setMaxTotal(100)
        HCC->>HCC: setDefaultMaxPerRoute(20)
        HCC->>HCC: Build CloseableHttpClient
        HCC->>HCC: Configure timeouts (read:5s, connect:30s)
        HCC-->>SpringCtx: Return RestTemplate Bean
    end
    
    SpringCtx->>ECP: Create EnableContextPropagation Bean
    ECP->>ECP: @PostConstruct triggered
    ECP->>Reactor: Hooks.enableAutomaticContextPropagation()
    Reactor-->>ECP: Context propagation enabled
    
    Note over SpringCtx: All Configuration Beans Ready
    
    rect rgb(200, 220, 255)
        Note over App,Redis: Runtime Request Processing Example
        
        App->>SpringCtx: Incoming HTTP Request
        SpringCtx->>CC: CorsWebFilter intercepts
        CC->>CC: Check CORS headers
        CC-->>SpringCtx: CORS headers added
        
        SpringCtx->>GRC: Need Redis operation
        GRC->>Redis: Reactive Redis call
        Redis-->>GRC: Response (non-blocking)
        
        SpringCtx->>Reactor: Context propagation
        Reactor->>Reactor: Propagate TraceId/MDC
    end
